text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Huh? I could've sworn someone was callin' for
me...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Maybe I was just imagining things...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Oh, the Three Goddesses statue. Might as well
offer a prayer for the road.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Please keep everyone safe so they can keep
doing their best!
